title: Andor 1 Media Player
description: Andor 1 is a compact standalone HDMI and composite media player for installations, live visuals, and gallery use: USB drives, playlists, MIDI, IR, remote, multi-unit sync, and video-wall modes, with a clean on-screen experience. Co-developed for artists by Paul Slocum. Full codecs, I/O, LZX system compatibility, and long-form playlist and menu behavior are documented in the product Manual tab on lzxindustries.net; read that before interfacing to TBC2 or other LZX decoders and encoders.
